descriptionTemplate: Ramona: Timeworn gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: When Ramona: Timeworn plays a card without triggering {Loop}, she gains 1 stack of {Negentropy} and gain [Arg2] Keyflare, up to 3 times per turn.
